inputs.label: I lead a purposeful and meaningful life
inputs.businessContext: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)

label_i18n.en: I lead a purposeful and meaningful life
label_i18n.tr: Amaçlı ve anlamlı bir hayat sürüyorum
label_i18n.de: Ich führe ein zielgerichtetes und sinnvolles Leben
label_i18n.fr: Je mène une vie pleine de sens et de but
label_i18n.es: Llevo una vida con propósito y significado
label_i18n.ar: I lead a purposeful and meaningful life

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 (Kesinlikle Katılmıyorum) ile 7 (Kesinlikle Katılıyorum) arasında bir ölçekte derecelendirin
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewerten Sie auf einer Skala von 1 (stimme überhaupt nicht zu) bis 7 (stimme voll und ganz zu)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluez sur une échelle de 1 (Pas du tout d'accord) à 7 (Tout à fait d'accord)
businessContext_i18n.es: Califique en una escala del 1 (Totalmente en desacuerdo) al 7 (Totalmente de acuerdo)

inputs.label: My social relationships are supportive and rewarding
inputs.businessContext: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)

label_i18n.en: My social relationships are supportive and rewarding
label_i18n.de: Meine sozialen Beziehungen sind unterstützend und lohnend
label_i18n.fr: Mes relations sociales sont soutenantes et enrichissantes
label_i18n.es: Mis relaciones sociales son de apoyo y gratificantes
label_i18n.ar: My social relationships are supportive and rewarding

inputs.label: I am engaged and interested in my daily activities
inputs.businessContext: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)

label_i18n.en: I am engaged and interested in my daily activities
label_i18n.de: Ich bin engagiert und interessiert an meinen täglichen Aktivitäten
label_i18n.fr: Je suis engagé(e) et intéressé(e) par mes activités quotidiennes
label_i18n.es: Estoy comprometido e interesado en mis actividades diarias
label_i18n.ar: I am engaged and interested in my daily activities

inputs.label: I actively contribute to the happiness and well-being of others
inputs.businessContext: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)

label_i18n.en: I actively contribute to the happiness and well-being of others
label_i18n.tr: Başkalarının mutluluğuna ve refahına aktif olarak katkıda bulunurum
label_i18n.de: Ich trage aktiv zum Glück und Wohlbefinden anderer bei
label_i18n.fr: Je contribue activement au bonheur et au bien-être des autres
label_i18n.es: Contribuyo activamente a la felicidad y bienestar de los demás
label_i18n.ar: I actively contribute to the happiness and well-being of others

inputs.label: I am competent and capable in the activities that are important to me
inputs.businessContext: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)

label_i18n.en: I am competent and capable in the activities that are important to me
label_i18n.tr: Benim için önemli olan aktivitelerde yetkin ve becerikliyim
label_i18n.de: Ich bin kompetent und fähig in den Aktivitäten, die mir wichtig sind
label_i18n.fr: Je suis compétent(e) et capable dans les activités qui sont importantes pour moi
label_i18n.es: Soy competente y capaz en las actividades que son importantes para mí
label_i18n.ar: I am competent and capable in the activities that are important to me

inputs.label: I am a good person and live a good life
inputs.businessContext: Rate on a scale from 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 7 (Strongly Agree)

label_i18n.en: I am a good person and live a good life
label_i18n.tr: İyi bir insanım ve iyi bir hayat yaşıyorum
label_i18n.de: Ich bin ein guter Mensch und lebe ein gutes Leben
label_i18n.fr: Je suis une bonne personne et je mène une bonne vie
label_i18n.es: Soy una buena persona y vivo una buena vida
label_i18n.ar: I am a good person and live a good life
